findings.summary: copper_layers_used reported as 0 for KiCad5 PCB with custom layer names
findings.details: The PCB uses KiCad5 legacy format with layer names 'Top' and 'Bottom' instead of the modern 'F.Cu'/'B.Cu'. The analyzer's layer detection does not recognize these custom names, so statistics.copper_layers_used=0 even though the board has 127 front-side and 8 back-side footprints.

findings.summary: Half-bridge power_net and ground_net labels are swapped in buck converter topology
findings.details: The bridge_circuits detector identifies a half-bridge with power_net='GND' and ground_net='SOLAR+'. This is inverted: SOLAR+ is the positive supply rail and GND is the circuit ground.
